prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model applied to ZTS, using its current price of $131.10. Historical daily log returns over the past 6 months were used to estimate a daily drift (mean log return) of 0.018% and a daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) of 1.257%. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution after 6 days. The confidence intervals are derived from this distribution, accounting for the cumulative effect of volatility over the prediction period.
